mapper.sql: id, file_name, file_url, file_size, file_type, file_suffix, md5, business_type, TO_CHAR(create_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createTime
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM sys_file_info WHERE delete_flag = 0
AND file_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{fileName}, '%')
AND business_type = #{businessType}
AND create_time >= TO_TIMESTAMP(#{startTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND create_time <= TO_TIMESTAMP(#{endTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM sys_file_info WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0
SELECT * FROM sys_file_info WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0
SELECT * FROM sys_file_info WHERE md5 = #{md5} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_file_info SET delete_flag = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0
